profile.name: Adrian Petrovic
profile.availability: Open to full-time and part-time opportunities.
profile.tagline: A passionate computer scientist based in Switzerland, dedicated to building efficient and innovative software solutions.

shell.title: portfolio.sh
welcome: Data migrated from dinervc.ch/about and dinervc.ch/projects.

commands.label: Identity
commands.description: Quick background from my previous portfolio.
output: Final-year computer science apprentice in Switzerland with full-stack focus.
Long-term goal: complete higher education at ETH Zurich and work as a software engineer.
I enjoy building, breaking, and reimagining technology across software and hardware.
Outside coding, I experiment with startups, collect vintage consoles, and build custom Game Boy projects.

commands.label: Core Stack
commands.description: Skills and current learning tracks from the old About page.
output: Core skills: Python, JS/TS, Swift, Java, C, React, Git, Bash, Microsoft Office.
Currently learning: Python, Swift, ESP32 electronics, C, and Passerelle prep.
I focus on robust architecture and practical delivery over hype.

commands.label: Career Journey
commands.description: Milestones copied from the old Career timeline.
output: 2019-08: Started computer science education.
2020-03: First school project, SlitherScript.
2021-04: Built Dice Dash.
2021-08: Started internship at Staubli AG.
2023-08: Won Hack United with Reflectory.
2023-12: Completed HilRes final apprenticeship project.
2024-01: Built Dinervc Lab portfolio in Vue.

commands.label: Project Highlights
commands.description: Highlights from the old Projects overview.
output: HilRes: strongest technical depth and robust HIL architecture with TDD approach.
Reflectory: Hack United 2023 winner (Best Solo Hack).
RegBankSight and Dice Dash were called out as noteworthy projects on the old site.
Project list below is ordered roughly from newer to older work.

commands.label: Contact
commands.description: Public channels from the old About page.
output: Email: adrian@dinervc.ch
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/adrianpetrovic
GitHub: github.com/Dinervc

projectsSection.description: Migrated from the old dinervc.ch/projects page.

projects.name: HilRes
projects.description: Final apprenticeship project: a Python module to manage Hardware-In-the-Loop resources for parallel test execution with extensible architecture and TDD.

projects.name: IDPA - Staubli ChatGPT (Grade 5.5)
projects.description: Interdisciplinary project analyzing Staubli's internal chatbot via interviews, surveys, and usage data to produce recommendations.

projects.name: RegBankSight
projects.description: Visualizes FPGA register banks in a tree structure and supports UART read/write interactions down to register field level.

projects.name: CircleViz
projects.description: Python tool that generates comparison circle diagrams similar to common AI model comparison visuals.

projects.name: AI Arcade
projects.description: Platform of AI-generated games, with a generated library of 16 experiences from simple challenges to complex 3D gameplay.

projects.name: SharcTestRunner
projects.description: Model-based testing workflow for HIL systems at Staubli, including model import, Python conversion, execution, and reporting.

projects.name: TikTakToe (Grade 5.5)
projects.description: TikTok-style social app clone built as apprenticeship project with Swift and Firebase.

projects.name: Cool Encryption Tool (Grade 6)
projects.description: Python Tkinter desktop app for file encryption and decryption, built as a school project.

projects.name: Dinervc Lab
projects.description: Portfolio experiment built in Vue.js to validate adaptability and rapid learning in a new framework.

projects.name: ViewPeakClips
projects.description: Tool to split long videos into equal clips and manage social-media publishing workflows via dashboard.

projects.name: Reflectory (Hackathon Winner)
projects.description: AI-powered mental health app built in one weekend for Hack United 2023, winning Best Solo Hack.

projects.name: Dice Dash
projects.description: Pig Dice inspired game with two-player mode, strong AI opponent, immersive music, and custom settings.

projects.name: Webglide
projects.description: Prompt-driven website generator concept built for startup exploration and school IDAF work.

projects.name: SlitherScript
projects.description: Enhanced Snake game with power-ups, adjustable difficulty, and random obstacles.

projects.name: Die Gespenster von Demmin Reading Journal
projects.description: Custom HTML/CSS reading journal concept with handcrafted visual style and custom font.
